If first sig digit is at `j`, there are `j-2` zeros between '.' and the digit. The value is $d \times 10^{-(j-2+1)} = d \times 10^{-(j-1)}$. So exponent is `-(j-1)`. The code prints `e-%d`, `j-1`.
